steps.t: The Carrock can be found in the Beorninglands. You should climb to the top of the Carrock and meet Léothred there.
The Carrock can be found in the Beorninglands. You should look out from the top of the Carrock.
Léothred can be found at the Carrock. You should talk to Léothred.
Léothred can be found at Limlók in the Floodfells. You should travel to Limlók.
